# The Zaika

> Cloud kitchen in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, specializing in Akni, Biryani, and Mughlai cuisine, with a broader delivery menu of 91 items. Delivery only — no dine-in.

The Zaika is a delivery-only cloud kitchen based in Sarkhej, Ahmedabad, operating since 2023. Known for Akni — a lighter, one-pot rice dish distinct from biryani and rooted in Gujarat's Muslim culinary tradition — alongside Biryani and Mughlai dishes. The full menu spans Akni, Biryani, Pizza, Burgers, Sandwiches, Gathiya, Sides, Beverages, Desserts, and Chicken Starters.

## Key Facts
- Address: TP-85, Sarkhej, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380055
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 7405407034
- Email: thezaika24@gmail.com
- Hours: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM, daily
- Delivery zones (~8km radius): Sarkhej, Prahlad Nagar, Juhapura, Makarba, Vejalpur, Satellite, Bodakdev, Thaltej
- Minimum order: ₹149 · Free delivery above ₹399 (₹40 delivery fee below that) · Estimated delivery time: 30 minutes
- Ordering: directly via this website (WhatsApp checkout), or via Zomato and Swiggy

## Pages
- [Menu](https://thezaika.vercel.app/menu): Full menu across all 10 categories with prices.
- [About](https://thezaika.vercel.app/about): The Zaika's story and background.
- [Contact](https://thezaika.vercel.app/contact): Contact details, hours, and FAQs.
